# Continuation of only CTT Analysis

```{r load-libraries-and-functions}
#| output: false
library(this.path)
library(dplyr) #e.g. for select
library(tidyr) # for reshaping data
library(stringdist) #levenshtein
library(stringr) # for reshaping data
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(modelsummary)
library(kableExtra)
library(arsenal)
library(forcats) 
source(file="functions.r") # all outsourced funtions
```

```{r CTT}
setwd(this.path::this.dir())
# requires data.Rdata from WoLKE-Pilot-2025.qmd file
# load data
load("data/data.Rdata")

# CT-Score aus CT28_01 übernehmen (-1/-9 als NA) und als CT_total_mean setzen
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    CT28_01 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(CT28_01)),
    CT28_01 = ifelse(CT28_01 %in% c(-1, -9), NA, CT28_01),
    CT_total_mean = CT28_01
  )

data_sprache <- data %>%
  filter(group == "sprache") %>%
  group_by(code) %>%
  filter(all(c("pre", "post") %in% time)) %>%
  ungroup()

# 1. MINT-Daten mit Pre- und Posttest
data_mint <- data %>%
  filter(group == "mint") %>%
  group_by(code) %>%
  filter(all(c("pre", "post") %in% time)) %>%
  ungroup()
# 2. Subset nur für PH Schwäbisch Gmünd
data_mint_sg <- data_mint %>%
  filter(location == "PH Schwäbisch Gmünd")

# Pre/Post-Effekt auf CT
model_ct_sprache <- lmer(
  CT_total_mean ~ time + age + gender + (1 | code),
  data = data_sprache
)
summary(model_ct_sprache)

# Deskriptiv: CT nach Zeit (Sprache)
ct_desc_sprache <- data_sprache %>%
  group_by(time) %>%
  summarise(
    n    = sum(!is.na(CT_total_mean)),
    mean = mean(CT_total_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd   = sd(CT_total_mean,   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
knitr::kable(ct_desc_sprache, caption = "CT (Sprache): Deskriptive Statistiken Pre/Post")


#### CT (Computational Thinking) – MINT ####

# Gesamt MINT: Haupteffekt Zeit
model_ct_time_mint <- lmer(
  CT_total_mean ~ time + age + gender + (1 | code),
  data = data_mint
)
summary(model_ct_time_mint)

# Gesamt MINT: Zeit * Intervention
model_ct_timeXint_mint <- lmer(
  CT_total_mean ~ time * intervention + age + gender + (1 | code),
  data = data_mint
)
summary(model_ct_timeXint_mint)

# Gesamt MINT: Zeit * Location
model_ct_timeXloc_mint <- lmer(
  CT_total_mean ~ time * location + age + gender + (1 | code),
  data = data_mint
)
summary(model_ct_timeXloc_mint)

# Nur PH Schwäbisch Gmünd
data_mint_sg <- data_mint %>% filter(location == "PH Schwäbisch Gmünd")

model_ct_time_mint_sg <- lmer(
  CT_total_mean ~ time + age + gender + (1 | code),
  data = data_mint_sg
)
summary(model_ct_time_mint_sg)

model_ct_timeXint_mint_sg <- lmer(
  CT_total_mean ~ time * intervention + age + gender + (1 | code),
  data = data_mint_sg
)
summary(model_ct_timeXint_mint_sg)

```
